name: ema_pullback_gold
description: Trade gold pullbacks into the 20 and 50 EMA during an established intraday trend.
entry_rules: Require price to be above both the 20 EMA and 50 EMA for long setups, or below both for short setups
Wait for a pullback into the EMA zone
Enter only after bullish or bearish confirmation, such as a rejection candle or break of a minor swing
exit_rules: Place stop below the pullback low for longs or above the pullback high for shorts
Prefer exits into the next intraday resistance or support area
research_notes: This is a better gold-specific continuation model than a plain crossover.
It should be compared against the current breakout and EMA logic on XAU_USD only.
